Various option to choose from: 240 Velcro dots, wiggly eyes, chenille sticks, and pom poms Educational and Fun: It enhancing your child's fine motor skills, creativity, problem-solving abilities, perfect for school projects and imaginative play. Perfect for All Ages: Whether it's for a school project, birthday party, or rainy day activity, this kit is suitable for kids of all ages. 详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "【SG Stock】Kids DIY Sand Art Kit | Creative Sand Painting Craft Set Unleash your child’s creativity with this fun and easy sand art kit! Perfect for kids of all ages, this set includes everything needed to create vibrant sand paintings with adorable cartoon designs. Core Advantages - **Safe & Non-Toxic Materials**: Made with child-safe, non-toxic colored sand and sturdy paper cards, ensuring a worry-free crafting experience. - **Multiple Cartoon Designs**: Features a variety of fun patterns, including animals, princesses, vehicles, and nature scenes, keeping kids engaged for hours. - **Easy to Use**: Simple step-by-step process: peel the sticker, sprinkle sand, and spread evenly to create beautiful art pieces. - **Educational & Developmental**: Encourages creativity, fine motor skills, and color recognition in young children. - **Perfect for Playdates & Parties**: Ideal for birthday parties, playdates, rainy day activities, or quiet time at home. - **Reusable Fun**: Create multiple artworks with the included sand and cards, perfect for sharing or displaying. Product Info - Contents: Multiple sand art cards, colored sand packets, and applicator tools - Features: Non-toxic, easy to use, educational, variety of designs - Recommended Age: 3+ years (adult supervision recommended for young children) - Safety Note: Contains small parts, not suitable for children under 3 years Spark your child’s imagination with this exciting sand art kit.
